who: HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month
offer: For HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, manual data extraction causes compliance issues. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual extraction of payroll data leads to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll teams
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR payroll teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try data extraction and compliance summary on 1-3 items

Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
